title: Bookbot Outcomes, Repository Baseline, and Evidence
description: A volunteer digital library asks for a word-count script but has not defined the report user, authorized input, counting policy, failure behavior, repository state, or acceptance evidence. Learners cumulatively produce Bookbot outcome, corpus, repository, and evidence charter through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define the report user, decision, input corpus, output contract, consequence of error, and observable success before coding.
Record text owner, license or permission, source, version, checksum, language, and allowed use before analysis.
Inspect Git status, branch, remotes, configuration origin, tracked files, ignore rules, and baseline tests before editing.
